structured_output.summary: Adds a retry wrapper around the upload client and threads a timeout through the config.

findings.title: timeout type changed from number to number | string
findings.description: Widens the type; callers that assumed a number now need coercion.
findings.reasoning: Callers doing arithmetic on the timeout now type-error or silently coerce; the diff widens the type without updating them.

result: Adds a retry wrapper around the upload client and threads a timeout through the config.
